allow: Bash(cd C:/SLS/sunlite-wholesale && npx next build --no-lint 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000 2>/dev/null || echo "Server may need restart")
Bash(cd C:/SLS/sunlite-wholesale && npx next build --no-lint 2>&1 | grep -i -E "error|warn|fail" | head -20)

Bash(find src/app/products src/app/why-sunlite src/app/resources -name "page.tsx" -type f -exec sed -i \\
  -e 's/bg-primary-dark/bg-bg-primary/g' \\
  -e 's/bg-light-bg/bg-bg-light/g' \\
  -e 's/bg-navy\\/80/bg-bg-navy\\/80/g' \\
  -e 's/bg-navy/bg-bg-navy/g' \\
  -e 's/text-text-light/text-white/g' \\
  -e 's/text-primary-dark/text-bg-primary/g' \\
  -e 's/bg-white\\/5 border border-white\\/10/bg-bg-card border border-white\\/[0.06]/g' \\
  -e 's/border border-white\\/10/border border-white\\/[0.06]/g' \\
  -e 's/border-white\\/5/border-white\\/[0.04]/g' \\
  -e 's/bg-white rounded-xl p-8 border border-black\\/5/bg-white rounded-xl p-8 border border-black\\/[0.04]/g' \\
  -e 's/border border-black\\/5/border border-black\\/[0.04]/g' \\
  -e 's/ italic//g' \\
  {} +
echo "Bulk replacements done")

Bash(cd /c/SLS/sunlite-wholesale
find src/app/products -name "page.tsx" -exec sed -i \\
  -e 's/from-primary-dark/from-bg-primary/g' \\
  -e 's/via-navy\\//via-bg-navy\\//g' \\
  -e 's/to-primary-dark/to-bg-primary/g' \\
  {} +
echo "Fixed gradient tokens in product pages")

Bash(cd /c/SLS/sunlite-wholesale
git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Redesign all sub-pages with new design system tokens \(Tasks 20-23\)

- Update 33+ pages: channel letters hub + 12 sub-products, blade signs,
  flat cut letters, lightboxes, SEG light boxes, custom fabrication,
  Why Sunlite hub + 4 sub-pages, Resources hub + blog, FAQ, glossary,
  guides hub + 4 guide pages
- Replace old CSS tokens \(bg-primary-dark, bg-light-bg, bg-navy,
  text-text-light\) with new design system tokens
- Replace custom CTA sections with shared CTASection component
- Replace FAQ custom accordion with FAQAccordion component
- Add HowTo schema \(JSON-LD\) to all 4 guide pages
- Verify Article schema on blog post template
- Remove all italic styling, trailing spacer divs
- Update card borders to new tokens \(border-white/[0.06], border-black/[0.04]\)
- Clean up unused imports flagged by build
- Build passes with zero errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
